privileged_info_summary: The task requires linking specific security policies to an exam. The target exam ('Physics 301 Midterm'), target exam template ('High Security Template'), and target client configuration ('Campus BYOD Config') are all synthetically generated and pre-seeded into the SEB Server MariaDB database via setup scripts, and explicitly queried in the export validation scripts.
